name: powernap
description: PowerNap — predict what you'll do next
author: PowerNap

scripts.copy-static: cp -r src/renderer/*.html dist/renderer/ && cp -r src/renderer/styles dist/renderer/
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json && npm run copy-static
scripts.start: npm run build && DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env electron -r dotenv/config dist/main/index.js
scripts.dev: npm run build && DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env electron -r dotenv/config dist/main/index.js
scripts.dist: npm run build && npx electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.release: npm run build && npx electron-builder --mac --publish always

extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: PowerNap needs screen recording to observe your workflow.
extendInfo.NSAccessibilityUsageDescription: PowerNap needs accessibility access to track input events.
